div.p: Engine Component: QuantizationEngine::ApplyPerChannelScale TDD Spec: Module M2-03 | Hardware Accelerated Tensor Ops

g.title: Logical reshape to allow row-wise broadcasting across weight matrix

g.text: Physical Memory: Input Scales (1D Vector) | Type: FP32 | Size: C_out * 4B

div.p: Per-channel quantization requires applying a unique scale factor $s_i$ to every row $i$ of the weight matrix.

The Trick: By reshaping the 1D scales vector to $(C_{out}, 1)$, we allow the hardware matrix engine to "broadcast" the single value $s_i$ across all $C_{in}$ columns of row $i$ in a single SIMD cycle.

g.title: Logical reshape to allow row-wise broadcasting across weight matrix
